A scan of Hay Tor in Dartmoor National Park in south east England UK. This would make a nice terrain tile in the background of a scene.

Created using 300 oblique images (sampled from a video) at 50m above the peak of the rocks.

This uncut raw model is medium quality with a 4K texture. If anybody would like a high quality reconstruction with a 16k texture please let me know.

models.author: Bársh

models.name: S**t happens
models.description:
*A.k.a. When life gives you eggs...*

</br>

Created in Blender and Gimp.

The egg model is a simple elongated UV-sphere, cut in two through a boolean modifier using a subdivided plane, which vertices have been randomized.

The egg white was simulated with fluids physics, before being manually sculpted to correct artifacts and smoothen it. The yolk was added manually later.

All the shell textures

models.name: A Windy Day
models.description:
Here's a visualization of global winds and precipitations on September 1st, 2019 (when [Hurricane Dorian](https://tinyurl.com/y3jewqqt) was hovering over the Bahamas, off the coast of Florida).

* Created in Python (using Matplotlib, NetCDF4, Scipy and Numpy modules)
* Public wind and precipitation data from the [NCEP/NCAR Reanalysis](https://tinyurl.com/y6mfqr6f)
* Wind particles colored accordin
models.author: Loïc Norgeot

models.name: Canon AT-1 Retro Camera
models.description:
Canon AT-1

This Canon AT-1 camera was first produced in Japan in 1977. Therefore, it's truly a retro camera and you can tell. Its heavy iron body with all sharp edges screams of days gone by.

This 3D-model is perfectly to scale to the camera's real-life counter-part and features 2k and 4k PBR textures made with Substance Painter.

For Blender users:

Creases are in place so that

I hope you will enjoy it nonetheless.
Feel free to download and improve it!
Turn to HD if it's not by default.

models.author: LowPolyBoy

models.name: Mont Saint Michel, 1km above
models.description:
Due to aeronautic restrictions,  I couldn't get closer than 1km  when I shot this place.  I used a 200mm lens, so that  the resolution is  about 3-5 cm. Therefore it is a really unique model, neither drones nor planes can get any closer.

Follow the guided tour for historical information about this beautiful monument

models.author: Shahriar Shahrabi

models.name: Fluffy Cloud
models.description:
Testing out some fake volumetric based on C++ generated noise images...

This does not look really impressive so far, but the technique seems to work fine and I guess that further experiments could only make for some future nicer models !

Note that using transparency planes (3 x 225 in this case!) is quite resource-intensive, and the model might only work fine on desktop.

All earthquakes, with a magnitude above 2.5, which have occured since January the 1st, 2000 (that's a little more than 500k earthquakes in total).

Following the annotations (use the arrows on the side of your screen on mobile) will pinpoint some of the most intense or deadly seismic events of the last 20 years. 

**Pro-tip:** Double-click somewhere on the model to focus on a specific area, or any

models.author: 99.Miles

models.name: The Climb
models.description:
Finally wrapped this little fun scene up! It's based on Catherine Unger's illustration of this colorful mountain with all its inhabitants! ![](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/C9xkkBlW0AAbYEx.jpg:large)

This time I drew in half of the light but gave it more depth with Sketchfabs light set up. 

All painted and modeled in Blender 3D.

models.author: Curlscurly

models.name: Tristennnoeckl Mountain Peak 2465
models.description:
A capture of the Tristenn peak (2465) in north of italy, in the apls. Beautiful place. You can see a bit of the valley in the skybox. 

It is a 4-5 hours hike to get there with a comfortable temp, the path up is safe but looks quite challenging. You can see the path in the scan. Because I had to down res the textures, the path is not as clear as the original scan. 

![](http://www.bergtoursuche.de

The package uses a single atlas texture that has base colors for all the models. This ensures fantastic visuals and unparalleled performance.

Includes 120+ foliage assets! These include bushes, trees, flowers, logs, stumps, mushrooms, debris, rocks, cl
models.author: Aligned Games

models.name: Fantasy Sea Keep
models.description:
A few simple sketchfab editor changes for a challenge for fun, the focus was a fantasy feel around dusk, the main changes are;

* Static color background with opacity changes for the sea and sky. This is a simple trick makes a cohesive color composition
* Normal maps added for everything most strikingly the water to break up the flat colors and depth
* Use of refraction opacity, for the sea top ha
models.author: JesseL

models.name: Carrara marble quarry
models.description: Carrara quarry mine marble, Luna marble to the Romans, is a type of white or blue-grey marble popular for use in sculpture and building decor. It has been quarried since Roman times in the mountains just outside the city of Carrara in the province of Massa and Carrara in the Lunigiana, the northernmost tip of modern-day Tuscany, Italy. More marble has been extracted from the over 650 quarry sites

The killer whale or orca (Orcinus orca) is a toothed whale belonging to the oceanic dolphin family, of which it is the largest member. The sea turtle was released soon after in good condition. The 3D model was initially created through a photogrammetry sc

Another addition to the tribute series to the rare ocean species. That's  Uca Mjoebergi - rare fiddler crab, but now textured and even animated! :-) 
This is not just some random moves - it's actually  Uca Mjoebergi' mating dance - as you can see, it's shoving off his bigger claw and trying to convince you in his own maturity and masculinity.

Reconstruction using 67 pictures extracted from my phantom3pro video.
I didn't have enough time to do better photogrammetry from photos.

![](http://imageshack.com/a/img924/7882/ExujXW.jpg)

models.name: Mount Fuji Volcano - Japan
models.description:
Mount Fuji Volcano in Japan.  This model features less snow than other models I made of this mountain.

Japan’s Mt. Fuji is an active volcano about 100 kilometers southwest of Tokyo. Commonly called “Fuji-san,” it’s the country’s tallest peak, at 3,776 meters. A pilgrimage site for centuries, it’s considered one of Japan’s 3 sacred mountains, and summit hikes remain a popular activity. Its iconic

models.name: Hopi Buttes Volcano - Bidahochi Basin, Arizona
models.description: This 3D model of a volcano in Northern Arizona's Hopi Buttes region sits in the Bidahochi Basin, an ancestral lake that blanketed this landscape.  Evidenced by columnar jointing of the basalt, which helps support the idea of rapid cooling by water on top, as well as nearby maar-diatreme volcanoes, it appears this volcano erupted into Lake Bidachochi while it was present.  Further evidence of this
